visual_description: In a dimly lit, greenish-hued room, a group of men are gathered. The camera focuses on a man in a shiny, sequined jacket who is shaking hands with an older man in a grey suit. To the left, two other men stand observing the interaction. The background consists of a tiled wall with framed pictures hanging on it. A red diamond-shaped decoration is visible on a dark door behind the men. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters are displayed. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the group. The audio features a man speaking in a friendly and polite tone, greeting someone with "Ah, hello, hello." Another man responds with a single, firm, and slightly aggressive word, "Sikat." The dialogue is brief and takes place in a quiet setting with no background music or other significant sound effects, making the exchange sound direct and confrontational. The man in the sequined jacket gestures with his free hand as he speaks to the man in the suit. The man in the dark jacket on the left looks on, while the man on the far left remains in the background. The older man in the suit listens intently. The white Chinese text remains on screen.
